title: T-004 — quality_holds + quality_hold_items schema + RLS (09-a-01)
prompt:
# T-004 — quality_holds + quality_hold_items schema + RLS

PRD: docs/prd/09-QUALITY-PRD.md §6.3 quality_holds DDL, §6.3 quality_hold_items, §9.1 RLS, §13.1 RBAC
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create the quality_holds and quality_hold_items physical tables with sequences, retention generated columns, RLS policies, and Drizzle schema entries. Foundation for entire 09-a hold/release sub-module.

## Implementation contract
1. Drizzle migration `packages/db/migrations/0100_quality_holds.sql` per §6.3 verbatim DDL: quality_hold_seq SEQUENCE START 1000, quality_holds with hold_number GENERATED, retention_until GENERATED, all CHECK constraints, idx_holds_active and idx_holds_ref indexes; quality_hold_items with UNIQUE(hold_id, license_plate_id).
2. ENABLE+FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY + policy `quality_holds_org_context` USING/WITH CHECK (`org_id = app.current_org_id()`) per §9.1 — the foundation function from `packages/db/migrations/002-rls-baseline.sql`; never `current_setting('app.tenant_id')` or `current_setting('app.current_org_id')` GUC.
3. Drizzle ORM schema files `packages/db/src/schema/qualityHolds.ts` + `qualityHoldItems.ts` with typed Insert/Select; export from schema index.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0100_quality_holds.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/qualityHolds.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/qualityHoldItems.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/quality-holds-schema.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0100 applied, when \d quality_holds is run, then all columns from §6.3 exist (hold_number, hold_seq, reference_type CHECK, priority CHECK, hold_status CHECK, retention_until GENERATED), org_id is NOT NULL, and RLS+FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY are enabled
2. Given two orgs A and B and the connection as `app_user` has called `app.set_org_context(session_token, org_A)`, when each inserts a quality_holds row and SELECTs under its own org session, then each sees only its own row (org isolation enforced via `app.current_org_id()`)
3. Given a quality_holds row with id X, when 2 quality_hold_items are inserted with the same (hold_id=X, license_plate_id=L), then the second insert fails with UNIQUE violation
4. Given pg_policies is inspected, when the quality_holds and quality_hold_items policies are listed, then qual/withcheck reference `app.current_org_id()` and contain no `current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id')` GUC

pipeline_inputs.description: Create quality_holds + quality_hold_items tables (org_id-scoped) with sequences, generated columns, indexes, foundation app.current_org_id() RLS, and Drizzle schemas.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0100 emits CREATE SEQUENCE quality_hold_seq, CREATE TABLE quality_holds and quality_hold_items per §6.3 (including hold_number GENERATED, retention_until GENERATED, all CHECK constraints, idx_holds_active partial index, idx_holds_ref index, UNIQUE on quality_hold_items). ENABLE+FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY with policy `*_org_context` USING/WITH CHECK `org_id = app.current_org_id()` per §9.1. Drizzle ORM mirrors columns with InsertSchema/SelectSchema. Tests verify schema shape, RLS isolation across two orgs via app_user + app.set_org_context, and UNIQUE constraint on quality_hold_items. RLS uses foundation `app.current_org_id()` function (Wave0 decision; see `_meta/audits/2026-05-14-architecture-and-cross-cutting-gaps.md` §Tenant-context).
out_of_scope: Do not implement audit triggers here (T-009)
Do not build CRUD API (T-006) or release flow (T-007)
acceptance_criteria: Given migration 0100 applied, when \d quality_holds runs, then all §6.3 columns exist (hold_number, hold_seq, reference_type CHECK, priority CHECK, hold_status CHECK, retention_until GENERATED), org_id NOT NULL, and RLS+FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY enabled

Given two orgs A and B and app.set_org_context called per org as app_user, when each inserts a row and SELECTs under its own org session, then each sees only its own row (RLS via app.current_org_id())
Given a quality_holds row, when two quality_hold_items insert with the same (hold_id, license_plate_id), then the second insert fails with UNIQUE constraint violation

Given pg_policies is inspected, when the quality_holds and quality_hold_items policies are listed, then qual/withcheck reference app.current_org_id() and contain no current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id') GUC
test_strategy: RED: write packages/db/__tests__/quality-holds-schema.test.ts asserting all ACs (schema introspection, RLS isolation via app.set_org_context as app_user, UNIQUE, pg_policies references function) before migration exists
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test quality-holds-schema'
risk_red_lines: Do not read current_setting('app.tenant_id') or current_setting('app.current_org_id') directly — use the foundation app.current_org_id() function so the NULL-safe setter contract is preserved.
Do not use tenant_id as the business-scope column; per Wave0 v4.3 lock it is org_id.
Do not skip RLS/FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY policy (BRCGS Issue 10 + org-tenancy mandate)
Do not change column names from §6.3 verbatim DDL (downstream consumers depend on names)
Do not forget retention_until GENERATED column (BRCGS 7y)
